case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. VS. JAMES SAUER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT, CCP 585; 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, CCP 1033; 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.
